citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:30am on 4/29/26.
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling both numbers, knocking on the house door, and
texting. The licensee responded by text that they were out of town and not able to conduct an inspection. Failure to
provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued
failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
Emily Steele, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:30am on 4/29/26. 
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by calling both numbers, knocking on the house door, and 
texting. The licensee responded by text that they were out of town and not able to conduct an inspection. Failure to 
provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued 
failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Emily Steele, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section
